title: polystichum tridens
intro: Polystichum tridens, also known as the Rock fern or the Three-toothed fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Polystichum tridens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
